articles.title: Asian Stocks Fall as Kospi Hit by Selloff in Chips: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Semiconductor stocks fell across Asia, dragging regional equities lower, as investors became more skeptical that the artificial intelligence-driven rally can withstand lofty valuations. Oil declined.
